results.text: Ryan Roobroeck - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. An instinctual player, Roobroeck puts the finishing touches on plays. He fires off passes in a catch-and-release motion or with hard one-timers, his shot hitting the back of the net before goalies can react. Ryan Roobroeck- 2026 NHL Draft Prospect Profile. 2026 NHL Draft prospect Ryan Roobroeck brings tons of skill and an elite shot to his game but can be unengaged which leads to mistakes.
